context: W3 config-snapshot regression — 13 service-config fields collapsed to shared_ptr snapshot (sd->svc->FIELD), touches all dispatch paths (response_type/ws_envelope_type/h2/intercept/url_capture). Verify PII warning rendering unaffected.
notes: W3 REGRESSION CONFIRMED for 'you' service. Opened fresh CDP tab to you.com (root redirected to /home, then navigated to the chat product). Reproduced baseline flow exactly: landed on you.com/chat?chatMode=default (same URL as #1231 OK baseline), performed CDP Page.reload(ignoreCache=true) AND a real foreground Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload. After full load (readyState=complete, 115KB outerHTML, 5 body children) the APF page-replacement did NOT fire: title remained 'You.com | Accurate Answers & Agents' (NOT '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'), and the full document HTML contained ZERO occurrences of '차단' or '보안' (checked body innerText AND documentElement.outerHTML to rule out shadow-DOM/toast). Page rendered as the normal (logged-out, blank) you.com chat SPA. Engine confirmed ALIVE during the same session: kimi.com tab still showed the block page (title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', hasBlock=true), proving the MITM intercept is generally firing — the failure is specific to the 'you' service page-level intercept. Baseline #1231 (W1+W2) was OK at the identical URL/flow; W3 config-snapshot refactor regressed you.com page-replacement. Verdict=FAIL_REGRESSION.
